## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Change type

- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Template
- [ ] Checklist
- [ ] Workflow example
- [ ] Security guidance
- [ ] Release guidance
- [ ] AI workflow guidance

## Evidence model

- Facts:
- Assumptions:
- Unknowns:
- Risks:

## Review checklist

- [ ] Neutral manual voice used.
- [ ] No first-person or third-person manifesto framing.
- [ ] No private names, private systems, local paths, client data, or credentials.
- [ ] No unsupported benchmark, market, performance, or security claims.
- [ ] Required, Recommended, and Optional language is consistent.
- [ ] Facts, assumptions, unknowns, and risks remain separate.
- [ ] Security impact reviewed.
- [ ] AI-assisted changes are labeled where relevant.
